name: Promestriene
description: Promestriene has been used in trials studying the prevention of Hypospadias.

interactions.name: Anastrozole
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Anastrozole can be decreased when used in combination with Promestriene.

interactions.name: Exemestane
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Exemestane can be decreased when used in combination with Promestriene.

interactions.name: Ospemifene
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Promestriene is combined with Ospemifene.

interactions.name: Capromab pendetide
interactions.description: Promestriene may decrease effectiveness of Capromab pendetide as a diagnostic agent.

interactions.name: Hyaluronidase
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Hyaluronidase can be decreased when used in combination with Promestriene.

interactions.name: Tipranavir
interactions.description: Promestriene may increase the dermatologic adverse activities of Tipranavir.

interactions.name: Somatotropin
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Somatotropin can be decreased when used in combination with Promestriene.

interactions.name: Lepirudin
